summary: A solid recording of a standout 1983 show with a smoking Help‑Slip‑Frank sequence and strong Rooster/Roses performances.
review: Both reviewers rave about the musical flow, highlighting an excellent Help‑Slip‑Frank opening to the second set, tight Bob‑song segues into drums and space, and powerful renditions of Rooster and Roses. No recording flaws are mentioned, suggesting a listenable source even though its exact type isn’t specified.

ai_rating.rationale: Enthusiastic comments about the performance outweigh the lack of technical detail; recording appears satisfactory, leading to a high overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not note any audio problems, implying the recording is acceptable though its exact source (soundboard/audience) isn’t mentioned.

standout_songs: Help on the Way > Slipknot! > Franklin's Tower
show_quality.setlist_flow: The second set kicks off with a revived Help‑Slip‑Frank that sets an energetic tone, followed by two Bob‑song jams into drums and space, then a strong back half featuring the Big Surprise and a memorable Stills after space.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Described as “nicely spacy Jerry,” indicating his improvisational playing was appreciated.
band_member_comments.Drums: Positive mention of the drums driving into Space and supporting the Bob‑song jams.
